# PodoKit

> An opinionated but extensible starter toolkit and CLI for full-stack TypeScript
> apps with NestJS, SvelteKit, TailwindCSS, shadcn-svelte, PostgreSQL, Redis,
> Docker, and k3s. `podo create` scaffolds a production-minded foundation;
> `podo add` layers in feature modules; `podo update` keeps projects current.

Generated projects are a monorepo: `apps/api` (NestJS — config validation,
global `ValidationPipe`, a stable `{ success, error: { code, ... } }` envelope)
and `apps/web` (SvelteKit — Tailwind v4, shadcn-svelte, typesafe-i18n, a
server-side API proxy). Conventions: TypeScript strict (no `any`/`@ts-ignore`),
Svelte 5 runes (no `$:`), every list uses the shared `DataTable`, all
user-facing strings go through i18n, and the backend returns stable error
`code`s. Default dev ports: web `:5001`, api `:5002`.

## Docs

- [Getting started](https://github.com/podosoft-dev/podokit/blob/main/docs/getting-started.md): create a project, run it, add AI agent guidance and the MCP server.
- [Templates](https://github.com/podosoft-dev/podokit/blob/main/docs/templates.md): `fullstack-nest-svelte`, `todo`, and `base`.
- [Modules](https://github.com/podosoft-dev/podokit/blob/main/docs/modules.md): auth, admin-dashboard, redis, rate-limit, audit-log, bullmq, sse, object-storage-s3, file-upload, and more (`podo add`).
- [Development](https://github.com/podosoft-dev/podokit/blob/main/docs/development.md): the host-process loop and the containerized dev environment (Traefik + `compose.dev.yaml`), plus DataTable/TableToolbar conventions.
- [Updating](https://github.com/podosoft-dev/podokit/blob/main/docs/updating.md): `podo status`/`diff`/`doctor`/`update` (3-way merge) and `eject`; file ownership tiers.
- [Testing](https://github.com/podosoft-dev/podokit/blob/main/docs/testing.md): Playwright e2e/ui shipped inside generated apps; faithful verification via Verdaccio.
- [Reporting a bug](https://github.com/podosoft-dev/podokit/blob/main/docs/reporting-bugs.md): issue-form link, a copy-paste report template, and a `gh` recipe for a person or an AI agent to file from the terminal.

## Packages

- [@podosoft/podokit (CLI)](https://github.com/podosoft-dev/podokit/blob/main/packages/cli/README.md): the `podo` binary — create, add, status, diff, doctor, update, eject.
- [@podosoft/podokit-mcp](https://github.com/podosoft-dev/podokit/blob/main/packages/mcp/README.md): a local MCP server (run via `npx`, no hosting) so AI tools can list/add modules, inspect the project, preview updates, and search the docs.
- [@podosoft/podokit-api-client](https://github.com/podosoft-dev/podokit/blob/main/packages/api-client/README.md): the typed client the frontend uses instead of raw `fetch` (better-auth + REST envelope).
- [@podosoft/podokit-auth](https://github.com/podosoft-dev/podokit/blob/main/packages/podokit-auth/README.md): the DB-backed auth-config pipeline (envelope-encrypted secrets, applied without a restart).
- [@podosoft/podokit-module-blog](https://github.com/podosoft-dev/podokit/blob/main/packages/podokit-module-blog/README.md): an external module for authenticated Markdown posts, pagination, comments, author ownership, and admin management.
- [@podosoft/podokit-contracts](https://github.com/podosoft-dev/podokit/blob/main/packages/contracts/README.md): zero-dependency shared contracts (Capabilities, error envelope, AppException).

## Optional

- [README](https://github.com/podosoft-dev/podokit/blob/main/README.md): project overview and quick start.
- [CHANGELOG](https://github.com/podosoft-dev/podokit/blob/main/CHANGELOG.md): release history.
- Remote docs MCP: register `https://gitmcp.io/podosoft-dev/podokit` to search these docs and the code from any MCP-capable AI tool (no install).
